(It's a bookshelf, what do you want to read about?)
Alaudia is the nation in the centre of Oloinia, it is
made up of many towns. The capital, Cathania, is the
most highly populated town in Alaudia. The four next
biggest towns are Sarama, Lilica, Agrima and Taura.
As it is very old, Alaudia's beginnings are unclear.
What we do know, however, is that it originated before
the nations of the Isle of Eaglet and Learin came into
existance. It is unknown if it came before Caesite.
There are many types of weapons.
The most popular ones are swords, daggers, axes, bows
But there's also firers, gloves, claws, guns,
crossbows, bows, canes, whips and flails.
Only certain classes of warriors are trained in
specific weapon types. Keep this in mind if
working with a team of fighters.
